APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEYMAN, JULIE ANN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
CHALLENGE OF VENUE RECEIVED AND FILED. NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$15.00) SERVED APR-13-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VAN BUREN, SARAH (LCSW #25904)

ADDITIONAL CORRESPONDENCE RE: CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT CREEKSIDE COUNSELING PARTNERS, LLC
DEFENDANT SARAH VAN BUREN'S ANSWER AND TRIAL BRIEF (MAY 15, 2012 AT 3:30PM)
PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT SARAH VAN BUREN'S ANSWER AND TRIAL BRIEF; PLAINTIFF'S SUPPORTIVE DECLARATION. (MAY 15,2012 HEARING @ 3:30PM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEYMAN, JULIE ANN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CREEKSIDE COUNSELING PARTNERS, LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "DEFENDANTS' CHALLENGE TO VENUE IS GRANTED", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
